install_help_already_installed: This app is already installed on your device.
install_help_ios_intro: Use Safari on iPhone/iPad to add this app to your home screen.
install_help_android_intro: Install this app from your Android browser menu.
install_help_android_step_2: Tap Install app or Add to Home screen.
install_help_desktop_intro: You can install this app from a desktop browser too.
install_help_desktop_step_1: Click the install icon in the browser address bar.
install_help_desktop_step_2: Confirm Install in the browser prompt.
